metadata.name: Monitor a Person of Interest with a Geofence

description: Police have a person of interest under surveillance and want to be alerted if they enter a sensitive area.

nodes.task_description: Receive a request from police to monitor a specific device ID (e.g., a phone or vehicle tracker).
Create a geofence around a sensitive location, such as a school or government building.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully draws the virtual fence on the map.

nodes.task_description: Set up an alert to be sent directly to the requesting detective if the monitored device ID crosses into the geofenced area.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates the conditional alert.
